initial_goal: Complete a converged geometry optimization on Pt(111).
final_goal: Complete a converged geometry optimization on Pt(111).

arguments.goal: Complete a converged geometry optimization on Pt(111).
accepted_facts: Job benchmark-001 FAILED with BRMIX (Broyden mixing) failure.
Diagnosis: electronic convergence failure (SCF convergence issue).
arguments.next_action: Await human guidance on whether to restart from charge density or adjust mixing parameters (e.g., reduce mixing parameter, switch to Kerker mixing, or try linear mixing).

arguments.research_goal: Complete a converged geometry optimization on Pt(111).
arguments.claim: Job benchmark-001 failed with BRMIX: electronic convergence (SCF) failure. The smallest valid recovery action is to restart the calculation from the previously converged charge density (restart charge density) to provide a better initial SCF guess.
